message:
feat(tui): add spring animations to progress bars

Phase 4b progress bar spring integration (br-27cl0):
- Progress bars now animate smoothly between values using SpringManager
- Dead zone of 2% prevents constant animation from small fluctuations
- Respects reduced motion settings
- Added TestProgressBarSpringsPercentTransitions test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
